TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Morocco hya' ga cyux maki' tay 32 00 N, 5 00 W na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 446,550 sq km (maki' tay 58ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 446,300 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 250 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 33,655,786. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 67.50%, lhlahuy hya' ga 11.50%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 21%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Rabat. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 30 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Mohammed VI of Morocco, aring ryax 23 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 1999 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: moro ¶~ ® ¶~ ®o ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, * ** w na xwe ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km, kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a raő≤at. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mpitu Ē ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a mońßamme* *i o* moro ¶~ ® ¶~ ®o, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
S.FORM: Morocco hya' ga cyux maki' tay 32 00 N, 5 00 W na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 446,550 sq km (maki' tay 58ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 446,300 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 250 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 33,655,786. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 67.50%, lhlahuy hya' ga 11.50%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 21%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Rabat. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 30 na tay mpitu' byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Mohammed VI of Morocco, aring ryax 23 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 1999 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: moro ¶~ ® ¶~ ®o ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, * ** w na xwe ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km, kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a *** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a raő≤at. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj mpitu Ē ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a mońßamme* *i o* moro ¶~ ® ¶~ ®o, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
